narrative:
Mead Township has 3,813 registered voters, with 60.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.8%, a clear Democratic lean of 8.0 percentage points.
